prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 4A-GE 20V 'Silver Top' (engine code: 4A-GE) with a custom billet crankshaft (Toda Racing) and forged pistons (JE 87mm, 11.5:1 CR) paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, custom manifold (Tommy Kaira), and a Tomei 260° camshaft set for high-RPM power delivery (8,500 RPM redline).

Full custom fuel system featuring a Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, ID1000 injectors, and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom 4A-GE base maps, optimized for E85 fuel with a flex-fuel sensor (AEM X-Series).

Chassis reinforcement via a Cusco 4-point bolt-in roll cage (Starlet-specific design) and a custom tubular subframe (TRD-inspired) to handle 350+ HP, paired with a KAAZ 1.5-way LSD and a custom driveshaft (Drive Shaft Shop) to eliminate drivetrain slop.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Pandem Starlet widebody kit (Pandem 001) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Veilside Fortune front bumper (modified for Starlet fitment) and a custom rear diffuser (Seibon Carbon).
Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Starlet-specific valving) with custom camber plates (BC Racing) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for aggressive stance (-2.5° front camber, -1.8° rear).

Custom interior featuring Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Starlet-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (with quick-release hub), and a full carbon fiber dash overlay (VIS Racing) with a digital dash (AEM CD-7).
